title: Petal
description: A vanilla+ flower and gardening mod :)
body:
Embark on a vibrant journey with Petal! Petal is a delightful Fabric vanilla+ mod that introduces a diverse array of new flowers to your Minecraft world. From the delicate charm of pansies to the graceful elegance of windflowers, prepare to unearth a plethora of unique floral species scattered across the diverse biomes of your world!
🌷 Join our Discord! 🌷
As long as credited, Petal may be used in modpacks, YouTube videos, etc.
